panels.description: A large, dark, symbiotic figure looms over a scientist in a white lab coat who is operating a control panel.
A silhouette of a character's head is in the foreground, looking toward a textured, dark figure against a city sunset backdrop.
Close-up shots of hands being overtaken by swirling black symbiotic matter.

text_blocks.text: YOU DON'T UNDERSTAND, BEN. THAT BEING INFECTED SPIDER-MAN.
text_blocks.speaker: Ben

text_blocks.text: IT MAY HAVE ENHANCED SOME OF HIS ABILITIES, BUT IT ALSO ENHANCED HIS EMOTIONAL RESPONSES... IT LATCHED ON TO HIS CONSCIENCE.
I KNOW HOW MUCH YOU WANT THIS, BEN... BUT THIS ISN'T THE WAY.
text_blocks.speaker: Scientist

page_summary: A scientist warns Ben about the dangers of a symbiote that enhances emotional responses and conscience. The page depicts Ben becoming increasingly possessed or influenced by the black symbiote, culminating in a disturbing, manic expression as he embraces the infection.
